---
title: "Teaching"
toc: true
---

## Current course

::: {.jfb-course-current}
### Pratique du calcul scientifique (2023–present)

**École Nationale des Ponts et Chaussées** — 1st year

Course on scientific computing with Julia: interpolation, integration, linear systems,
ordinary differential equations, and numerical methods. Includes lectures, tutorials and
Jupyter notebooks.

[{{< iconify simple-icons github >}} Accéder au cours](https://enpc-casc.github.io/){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-primary}
:::

## Past courses

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .p-3}
### Mécanique des milieux continus (2002–2022)

**École Nationale des Ponts et Chaussées** — 1st year

Tutorials on continuum mechanics for solids and fluids.

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .p-3}
### Mécanique numérique (2003–2005)

**École Nationale des Ponts et Chaussées** — 2nd year

Tutorials on numerical mechanics problems.

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .p-3}
### Mécanique des milieux poreux (2003)

**École Nationale d'Ingénieurs de Tunis (ENIT)** — Master (DEA MS2)

Course on porous media mechanics covering flow through porous materials,
consolidation, and coupled hydro-mechanical processes.

:::
:::

:::
